nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Shallum and his conspiracy which he made, behold they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.

esv.text: Now the rest of the deeds of Shallum, and the conspiracy that he made, behold, they are written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel.

cnv.text: 沙龍其餘的事蹟和他反叛的經過，看哪，都寫在以色列諸王的年代誌上。

ccb.text: 沙龙其他的事及其谋反的经过都记在以色列的列王史上。
